refnamediv.refpurpose: differentiates a ts ignoring NA values

listitem.para: * arg1 = the order of differenciation (optional, set to 1 if not provided, can be > 0, = 0 or < 0) or a ts
* arg2 = a time series if the first argument was set to the order of differentiation

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Computes x(t)-x(t-n) for a timeseries x where all NA values are ignored (that is x(t-n) is the nth non NA value preceding x(t)). Equivalent, but a little bit quicker than x-lagts(n,x).

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
